text.title: Nomad Async Ops Stack Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Nomad Async Ops Stack methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Primary writing/coding tools work fully offline; sync on reconnect. Cloud-only tools (Notion live edit) are forbidden as primary.
rule.rationale: Primary writing/coding tools work fully offline; sync on reconnect. Cloud-only tools (Notion live edit) are forbidden as primary.

rule.statement: Payment ops (Stripe disputes, refunds, billing) are scheduled in fixed operator-local windows. 'Whenever' is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Payment ops (Stripe disputes, refunds, billing) are scheduled in fixed operator-local windows. 'Whenever' is forbidden.

rule.statement: Support SLA states 'first response ≤24h business-day operator-local'. Sub-24h promises while nomadic are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Support SLA states 'first response ≤24h business-day operator-local'. Sub-24h promises while nomadic are forbidden.

rule.statement: Spec names the single nomad operator. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Spec names the single nomad operator. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-nomad-async-ops-stack.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
